actions.name: Enforce all-repository triage role
actions.description: Enforces the 'All-repository triage' role for eligible members in the organization by checking current role assignments and assigning the role if necessary. It can run in a dry-run mode to simulate changes without making any modifications. The workflow generates a summary report of the actions taken for each user.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 3:00, on Mon

actions.name: Invite contributors to Armbian ORG
actions.description: Invites eligible contributors to the Armbian organization by collecting PR authors from specified repositories and checking their membership status. It identifies users who are not already members and can optionally run in a dry-run mode without sending actual invitations. The results are summarized and displayed, indicating which users are eligible for invitation.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on Sun

actions.name: Generate base-files package index
actions.description: Generates and updates the base-files package index by running a Python script that processes data and commits changes to the repository. It checks out the repository, sets up the Python environment, installs necessary dependencies, and handles the commit and push of updated files. Additionally, it triggers a directory listing event after the update.
actions.cron_schedule: at 45 minutes past the hour, at 3:00

actions.name: Generate Armbian download index
actions.description: Generates and updates the Armbian download index by creating a JSON file and compressing torrent files. It checks out multiple repositories, installs necessary dependencies, retrieves data, and commits changes to the GitHub Pages repository. Additionally, it triggers further workflows for redirector configuration and directory listing updates.

actions.name: Generate build engine inventory
actions.description: Updates image information data by generating an inventory JSON file and committing changes to a specified branch. It checks out necessary repositories, produces the inventory, and conditionally triggers downstream workflows based on changes. The process includes permission fixes, data movement, and push retries to handle conflicts.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 4 hours

actions.name: Generate Armbian Jira excerpts
actions.description: Generates and updates Jira excerpts for Armbian by pulling issue data from Jira and creating HTML files for current and planned issues. It commits these changes to a GitHub repository, ensuring the latest information is available. The workflow runs on a schedule and can also be triggered manually.
actions.cron_schedule: at 45 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Update partners and maintainers
actions.description: Fetches and generates JSON files for partners and maintainers from Zoho Bigin, validates the data, and commits the results to a GitHub repository. It consolidates partner information into a single JSON file and enriches maintainer data with GitHub avatars and activity metrics. The workflow also generates a summary of partners for display in GitHub Actions. Lastly, it triggers a directory listing update.
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Update Raspberry Pi imager JSON
actions.description: Generates and updates a JSON index for the Raspberry Pi imager by executing a Python script that creates the JSON file and commits it to the repository. It checks out the relevant repository, installs necessary dependencies, and handles potential conflicts during the commit process.

actions.name: Update Armbian automation status
actions.description: Generates reports for multiple Armbian repositories by scanning specified folders and compiling data into JSON files. Merges individual reports into a single index and commits the results to a designated branch. Additionally, triggers a website generation process upon completion.

actions.name: Generate board & vendor thumbnails
actions.description: Generates board and vendor thumbnails by processing images and configuration files. It builds JSON matrices for boards and vendors, resizes images to specified widths, and uploads the processed images to cache servers. Additionally, it generates a summary report of processed and failed items.

actions.name: Generate image build lists
actions.description: Generates image build lists and kernel descriptions for various Debian and Ubuntu releases. It retrieves image information, processes it to create YAML files, and updates a data branch with the generated files. Additionally, it provides a summary of the generated files and handles potential git conflicts during the update process.

actions.name: Download keyrings for Debian & Ubuntu
actions.description: Downloads and updates keyring data for Debian and Ubuntu by fetching the latest keyring packages and storing them in a specified repository directory. It handles both Ubuntu and Debian packages, ensuring the latest versions are linked appropriately and committed to the repository. Additionally, it generates a directory listing event after the updates are made.
actions.cron_schedule: at 40 minutes past the hour, at 3:00, on Wed

actions.name: Generate motd for Linux OS
actions.description: Generates a message of the day (MOTD) for Linux OS by retrieving data from JSON files, formatting it, and committing updates to a repository. It checks out multiple repositories, processes the MOTD content, and pushes changes if there are updates. Additionally, it triggers another action for keyring updates after completing the MOTD generation.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 4:00

actions.name: Cache servers JSONs
actions.description: Generates JSON files containing server information from NetBox, including download, cache, and upload paths, as well as details about GitHub runners. It retrieves data through API calls, processes it with jq, and commits the results to a specified branch in the repository. The workflow also triggers a subsequent update for a web index after committing the changes.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 2:00

actions.name: Update Torrent Trackers
actions.description: Generates and updates a list of torrent trackers by collecting data from a specified repository, formatting it, and committing the results to a branch. It prepares a file with tracker entries and triggers another workflow upon completion. The process includes error handling for Git operations to ensure successful updates.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 4:00

actions.name: Generate github.armbian.com content
actions.description: Generates and deploys content for a GitHub Pages site by rebuilding the data branch with updated directory listings. It checks out the necessary branches, stages generated data, and commits changes before deploying to GitHub Pages. Additionally, it manages SSH keys for remote operations.
actions.execution_method: push to data branch, workflow_dispatch, repository_dispatch

actions.name: Dispatch website sync
actions.description: Dispatches a synchronization event to rebuild the public site at armbian/website after the content generator workflow completes successfully. It ensures that the synchronization only occurs for successful runs on the main branch, preventing incomplete data from being pushed to production. The workflow can also be manually triggered for one-off retries.

actions.name: Enable Hetzner ARM64 runners
actions.description: Enables provisioning and management of Hetzner ARM64 runners by creating and deleting virtual machines based on user-defined parameters. Generates a matrix of server instances to be created, performs work on those instances, and ensures cleanup after execution. Supports dynamic input for the number of machines and server types.

actions.name: Mirror artifacts to our CDN
actions.description: Mirrors artifacts to a CDN by splitting JSON data into manageable parts and cleaning up older files on servers. Retrieves the latest release artifacts from a specified repository, processes them, and uploads the resulting JSON parts. Cleans up older files on the servers based on the latest tags and CDN tags derived from the artifacts.

actions.name: APT repositories update
actions.description: Updates APT repositories by downloading external packages, preparing repository structures, and managing permissions. Cleans up input directories and generates reports on .deb files. Ensures proper ownership and permissions for the repositories.

actions.name: Update CDN redirector
actions.description: Updates CDN redirector configurations by downloading package and image data from a specified source of truth, comparing them against existing mirrors, and generating reports on synchronization status. It handles multiple platforms and types, including beta and stable packages, images, and cache. The workflow also manages permission checks and artifact uploads for further processing.

actions.name: Validate board images & vendor logos
actions.description: Validates board images and vendor logos by checking their compliance with specified object density limits. Installs ImageMagick to perform the validation and executes a custom script to assess the images. Ensures that images meet quality standards before integration.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on day 1

actions.name: Set labels based on PR size
actions.description: Sets labels automatically based on pull request size, file categories, creation date for quarterly tracking, and removes the 'Ready to merge' label on updates. It categorizes PRs by size, applies labels from a configuration file, and determines a quarterly label based on the PR's creation month.

actions.name: Listen PR review and label it
actions.description: Listens for approved pull request reviews and saves the associated pull request number. Uploads the pull request number as an artifact for further processing or tracking.

actions.name: Set label on PR approval
actions.description: Sets a label on a pull request upon approval by reviewers and removes specific review-related labels. Downloads the pull request number from a previous workflow run and uses it to apply the 'Ready to merge' label if the approval is confirmed. Additionally, it cleans up any unnecessary labels associated with the review process.

actions.name: Synhronize labels
actions.description: Synchronizes labels from a YAML file to issues and pull requests based on specified conditions. It reads the label definitions from '.github/labels.yml' and applies them accordingly, allowing for a dry run during pull requests to preview changes. This ensures that the correct labels are maintained across the repository.
actions.execution_method: workflow_dispatch, push to main branch, pull_request

actions.name: Clean workflow logs
actions.description: Cleans up workflow logs by deleting runs older than a specified number of days, helping to manage storage and maintain a tidy environment. It allows for customization of the retention period through inputs during manual execution or defaults to 21 days for scheduled runs.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on Tue

actions.name: Watchdog
actions.description: Monitors and manages the execution of specified workflows by rerunning failed jobs up to three times. Executes a set of predefined scripts and checks their latest run status, triggering reruns if necessary. Operates on a scheduled basis or can be manually triggered.

actions.name: Self hosted runners status
actions.description: Checks the status of self-hosted runners and generates a summary report. Retrieves runner information from GitHub and virtual machine details from NetBox, compiling the data into an HTML summary. The report includes details on CPU, memory, storage, and runner status.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 6:00

actions.name: Release summary
actions.description: Generates a release summary report by fetching merged pull requests over a specified period and formatting the results into a Markdown digest. It utilizes external APIs for natural language processing and image generation to enhance the report's presentation. The report can be published as a GitHub release if specified.
actions.cron_schedule: at 5 minutes past the hour, at 6:00, on MON

actions.name: Fetch Armbian kernel versions
actions.description: Fetches the latest Armbian kernel versions from the Armbian APT repository and updates SVG badges and JSON data in the 'data' branch. Generates badges for CURRENT and EDGE kernel versions and commits these updates to the repository. Ensures proper error handling and version validation throughout the process.
actions.cron_schedule: at 15 minutes past the hour, at 2:00
